channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 7 non-traditional paths to shipping real products
item.description: Ship a real product in 10 minutes with Vercel + Next.js — real benchmarks, costs, and the mistakes that cost teams $8k before shipping.

item.title: Land remote jobs: salary cheat sheet for 2026
item.description: Land remote jobs: salary cheat sheet for 2026 — compute a defensible ask in 5 minutes using US market data and your city’s cost-of-living index.

item.title: Stop wasting database connections on CPU cores
item.description: Cut database pool latency 60% by sizing max connections to concurrency, not CPU cores — the mistake 80% of teams made in 2026.

item.title: Build a portfolio that converts remotely
item.description: Build a remote portfolio that converts: use production-grade systems, not demos. Real metrics, cost control, and incident response matter more than GitHub stars. Includes FastAPI, Redis, Locust examples and 2026 hiring insights.

item.title: Production FastAPI vs Django REST in real numbers
item.description: Cut API response time 40 % with FastAPI vs Django REST — real cost, latency, and hiring data for 2026 teams

item.title: Set pool size right or pay the cost
item.description: Cut database connection pool waste 40% with exact settings that work in 2026 — connection validation overhead, pod memory impact, and the async vs sync split most teams miss.

item.title: Get paid 2.3x more: remote salary script
item.description: Get paid 2.3x more: Python script that pulls real-time Levels.fyi data, normalizes for cost-of-living, and outputs a defensible remote salary range in 500 ms. Includes FX caching, health checks, and a counter-offer template.

item.title: AI tools that turned amateurs into pros
item.description: 4 AI dev tools shipping real apps in 2026 — latency deltas, review times, and the one prompt that saved 65% boilerplate.

item.title: Under 500 ms RAG at scale: what breaks
item.description: Cut RAG latency 66% and costs 74% with tiered retrieval, multilingual embeddings, and prompt compression — real numbers from 50k daily users in Vietnam and Indonesia.

item.title: 2026 salaries hinge on 3 AI skills
item.description: Cut AI tool costs 76% with vector search vs prompt engineering — latency, recall, and salary data from 2026 benchmarks show which AI skills actually move the needle on compensation.

item.title: Forget the resume build the system
item.description: Build a remote portfolio that actually gets hired: 90-day sprints, cost discipline, and production-grade artifacts that close offers in 7 days.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling costs
item.description: Reduce API costs 34% by choosing the right push tech — concrete WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks with Node 20 LTS, Python 3.11 and Redis 7.2.

item.title: Vector DBs vs nearest neighbors: 3 tests that change
item.description: Cut vector search latency 60% by measuring first: p95/p99 tests on 2026 hardware show hnswlib beats Pinecone/Weaviate when vectors fit in RAM. Concrete benchmarks, cost models, and the one mistake I made for two weeks.

item.title: WebSocket, SSE, or Polling? Hard numbers decide
item.description: Compare WebSockets vs SSE vs long polling with 2026 benchmarks — latency, cost, and memory for 20k users. Choose the right push tech for your real-time app.

item.title: Portfolio mistake blocking remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio mistake blocking remote jobs — switch to boring APIs, live links, and recruiter-ready signals. 3 real examples and the exact stack to deploy in 7 days.

item.title: Ship real apps without being a DevOps hero
item.description: Ship 6 products in 2026 with AI tools — time to first deployment, costs, and the exact tools that worked for non-traditional teams. Real benchmarks, no fluff.

item.title: Fine-tune AI pay in 2026
item.description: Fine-tuning pays 28% more than prompt engineering in 2026 — but only if you hit latency and cost targets. See the head-to-head benchmarks, real-world cost savings, and the exact moment to switch from prompts to fine-tuning.

item.title: Bust the pool size myth
item.description: Cut database timeout rates 75% with the right pool size — real benchmarks and cost curves from 18 systems in 2026

item.title: Ask for 30% more in 2026 remote salary
item.description: Why I wrote this (the problem I kept hitting) I spent two months negotiating with a US-based fintech that had already approved my rate—only to realize…

item.title: Latency stalls at 500ms: RAG pipelines break here first
item.description: Cut RAG latency 81%: p95 from 500 ms to 95 ms with async embedding isolation, Redis backpressure queue, and HNSW tuning. Real AWS costs, code, and metrics for 2026.
